Skip to contents
butlerrr 0.1.0
  • Reference

Function reference

Dots (...)

Management of ... for easier coding.

get_dots() dots_eval() dots_splice()
Collect, evaluate, and/or splice dots(...)

Language Objects

Conversion

enlang() enlangs()
Convert to "expressions" (similar to rlang::expr())
encall() encalls()
Convert to Named Calls (e.g. func())
as_sym() as_syms()
Convert to Symbol(s)

To Strings

lang_auto_name()
Automatic Names for Lists of Expressions
lang_to_str() lang_to_chr()
Expressions to Strings or Character Vectors

Predicates

is_callable() are_callable()
Is an object callable?
is_expr() are_expr()
Is an object an expression?
is_ns_sym() are_ns_sym() is_ns_call() are_ns_call()
Does a language object include namespace?
is_symbol2() is_call2() is_call_simple()
Extensions of rlang::is_symbol() and rlang::is_call()
is_symbolic() are_symbolic()
Is an object a call or a symbol?
is_syntactic_literal() are_syntactic_literal()
Is an object a syntactic literal?

Helpers

match_call() match_call_self()
Call Matching (similar to rlang::call_match)
new_call_simple() call_simple()
Create new named calls

Functions

fn_fmls() fn_fmls_nms() fn_fmls_syms() fn_fmls_update()
Function Formals
fn_call() fn_calls()
Get a call from a function
fn_name() fn_names()
Get function names from functions

Symbolic Types

symbolic_type0() symbolic_type() symbolic_types()
Symbolic types

Type Predicates

is_base_type() is_base_scalar()
Is an object a base type?
is_named0() is_unnamed0() is_named() is_unnamed()
Does a vector have names?
is_integer_chr()
Does a character vector only contains integers?
is_numeric_chr()
Does a character vector only contains numbers?
is_string()
Is object a single string
is_whole()
Is a number whole?

Vectorised Predicates

all2() any2() not_all() not_any()
Extensions of base::all and base::any plus their negations.

Strings

str_format()
String formatiing/padding
str_oxford()
Collapse a character vector using Oxford Comma
str_pad_num()
Padding of character vector of integers
str_collapse() str_coll() str_p0() str_p()
Collapse Strings
str_embrace() str_parens()
Embrace Strings
str_enum() str_itemize()
Enumerate and format the elements of a character vector.
str_return() str_r() cat_return() rcat()
Concatenate strings with "\n".
str_to_symbolic() str2symc() chr_to_symbolic() chr2symc()
Convert Strings to Symbolic Objects (generalizes base::str2lang)

Replicate

rep_times() rep_each() rep_along()
Extensions of base::rep

Naming

set_names() new_names() as_named()
Naming Helpers
is_named0() is_unnamed0() is_named() is_unnamed()
Does a vector have names?
are_named() are_unnamed() which_named() which_unnamed()
Are elements of a vector named?

Utilities

match_call() match_call_self()
Call Matching (similar to rlang::call_match)
new_call_simple() call_simple()
Create new named calls

Standalone Functions

map() walk() map_lgl() map_int() map_dbl() map_chr() map2() map2_lgl() map2_int() map2_dbl() map2_chr() imap() pmap() keep() discard() map_if() compact() transpose() list_t() every() some() negate() reduce() reduce_right() accumulate() accumulate_right() detect() detect_index()
purrr Standalone Replacement Functions

On this page
